text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Amazon has yet to show up for training, so I
go looking for her...

text_block_list.name: Miho Student
text_block_list.text: Um, Hishiama... I think that's enough for now...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Come on, you can't expect me to back down from
a fight. One more round... I'm not losin' this time!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Can't ya tell? I'm playing a game of Old Maid!
Man... why can't I win?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Huh? What about it? Why are you bringin' up
training all of a—

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I'm so sorry, Teach! I got so carried away, I
completely forgot we had training today!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Amazon looks apologetic enough, so I let
her off with a firm reminder to be more careful
next time.
